stemHtml: Regarding the securing of traffic load, which of the following answers is correct?

options.a: During rotation on take-off, the dangers of an unsecured load include possible damage to bulkheads and the forward shift of the CG to outside of the CG limits.
options.b: Traffic load must be restrained thoughout flight so that only the predictable movement of CG with fuel burn can occur.
options.c: Unit load devices must be restrained with straps to the designated tie-down points in the cargo floor.
options.d: During flight, containers and pallets are permitted to remain on rollers within tracks, provided they are secured by latches.
